title: Pod Security Admission
description:
## Pod Security Admission (PSA)

Pod Security Admission replaced PodSecurityPolicies (PSP) to enforce security standards at the namespace level.

**Your task:**

A namespace named `secure-workloads` already exists. Add the necessary label to this namespace to **enforce** the `restricted` pod security standard.

```bash
# Verify your label:
kubectl get ns secure-workloads --show-labels
```

hints.title: Namespace Label
hints.body: Label the namespace with the `pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce=restricted` key-value pair.

setup_commands.command: kubectl create namespace secure-workloads --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
